seoTitle: Caroline vs Carrickalinga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caroline and Carrickalinga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caroline and Carrickalinga.
heading: Caroline vs Carrickalinga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caroline, South Australia and Carrickalinga, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrickalinga has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Caroline (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caroline or Carrickalinga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caroline has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Carrickalinga scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caroline scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Carrickalinga scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caroline or Carrickalinga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrickalinga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
